title: Ecologic Fixes
description: Simple addon to Ecologics that stops coconuts from clearing all player effects.
body:
Stops Ecologics' Coconut Slices from clearing all player effects.

Coconut slices clear all effects from a player, including the Infection effect, which Cursed Walking (in part) relies on. 

This addon fixes that by making coconut slices do nothing at all. They can stay simple food sources, and players can clear the effects they should be clearing via milk, or some other modded method.

Of course, the dedicated pack maker could now restore effect clearing code to the coconut slice via KubeJS. 

All in all, we just need this for Cursed Walking. Only install this mod if you really don't want players to clear effects via the coconut, or if you (as a player) are tired of accidently eating a coconut slice and losing your potion effects. 

If you have other questions or concerns, you can reach me in CurseForge comments, or better yet, in my discord: https://discord.gg/mZUjrWK6NF
